rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's city (Berlin, DE → Bucharest, Romania), a relocation within Europe carrying no job-relevant signal. The score is identical (5/10) across both evaluations, and the substance is unchanged: both flag the same core gap — no production C++/Rust in routing/navigation/geospatial pipelines and recent work dominated by TypeScript/Node.js. The wording differs and the variant reorganizes strengths/concerns, but none of the reasoning keys off the location change; these are ordinary run-to-run rewordings.
